[doctor] 运行摘要
- run_id: fixture-missing-source-state
- checkpoint: completed
- resumed_from: fixture-missing-source-parent
- lineage.mode: resume
- lineage.is_resumed_run: True
- lineage.source_run_id: fixture-missing-source-parent
- lineage.source_checkpoint: completed
- lineage.source_resumed_from: 无
- lineage.resume_strategy: repair-review-first
- lineage.resume_strategy_reason: source should exist but state file is unavailable
- 这是一轮 resumed run：当前运行继承自 fixture-missing-source-parent（source checkpoint: completed）。
- 源运行本身不是已记录的 resumed run，当前链路到此为止。
- 当前已解析到 2 段 lineage 链。
- 允许动作：继续人工排查；必要时再次 repair；显式 dry-run。
- 禁止动作：不要把未收口 repair run 当成普通 resume；不要跳过复查直接真实 apply。
- 最近的异常祖先节点：fixture-missing-source-parent （state=missing）。
- 说明：lineage 指向的 source run state.json 缺失或不可读；已停止继续向上解析。
[doctor] lineage chain
- depth: 2
- 1. [current] fixture-missing-source-state (checkpoint=completed, final=success; strategy=repair-review-first; reason=source should exist but state file is unavailable)
- 2. [ancestor-1] fixture-missing-source-parent (checkpoint=缺失, final=missing-state; alerts=state=missing)
[doctor] 状态
- apply_execute: skipped
- repair:
- rollback:
- final: success
[doctor] journal
- entries: 1
- last_event: run.complete [success]
- last_message: fixture complete
[doctor] 下一步建议
- 当前处于 repair-review-first；建议先跑 ./install-interactive.sh --doctor fixture-missing-source-state 复核当前 run 与 companion result，再决定是否只做 dry-run、repair、rollback 或人工处理。
- 输入快照可用于 resume：__FIXTURE_ROOT__/runs/fixture-missing-source-state/inputs.env
